meta.reason: Higher values of Clump Thickness and Cell Size Uniformity are often associated with malignancy.
Elevated Bare Nuclei or Bland Chromatin levels can indicate abnormal cell growth.
Low Marginal Adhesion and Single Epithelial Cell Size may suggest benign characteristics.
Increased Normal Nucleoli and Mitoses are often linked to aggressive tumor behavior.
Low Cell Shape Uniformity or Clump Thickness can be indicative of non-cancerous cells.
